description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in modern, urban streetwear. He wears a high-collared, fitted pullover and athletic jogger pants with graphic designs on the legs. His shoes are sporty and streamlined, suitable for walking or running in an urban environment. The individual has a distinctive hairstyle with voluminous, styled hair and appears to be wearing a face covering or mask that covers the lower half of his face. His stance is relaxed but alert, with arms slightly bent and feet apart, suggesting readiness to move. The overall appearance is contemporary and functional, blending style with practicality for city life.
description: A modern adult male in urban streetwear with a high-collared pullover, graphic joggers, sporty shoes, and a distinctive voluminous hairstyle. He stands in a relaxed, alert posture with a face covering.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high-collared pullover, face covering, graphic joggers, and full hairstyle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face covering, hair volume, and the side graphics on the joggers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the pullover, joggers, and shoes, as well as the hairstyle from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm position, and the right leg's graphic design.
attribute_clothing_type: urban athletic wear with a high-collared pullover and graphic jogger pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly bent and feet apart
